g_text_translate.ru:
В корейском языке есть почетное обращение и неформальная речь. Вы должны использовать почетное обращение к пожилым людям. Поэтому корейцам очень важно знать возраст других. Вам также следует обращаться с уважением к людям, которых вы встречаете впервые. Вот почему люди используют почетные обращения, спрашивая дорогу или в общественных учреждениях. Кроме того, вам следует обращаться к людям, которые стоят выше вас в компании. Люди используют неформальную речь с людьми, которые моложе их. Однако, даже если они старше вас, вы можете неофициально поговорить со своими близкими друзьями или братьями.

#######

มีการให้เกียรติและคำพูดที่ไม่เป็นทางการในภาษาเกาหลี คุณควรใช้คำให้เกียรติกับผู้สูงอายุ ดังนั้นจึงเป็นเรื่องสำคัญมากที่ชาวเกาหลีจะต้องรู้อายุของผู้อื่น คุณควรใช้คำให้เกียรติกับคนที่คุณพบเป็นครั้งแรกด้วย นั่นเป็นสาเหตุที่ผู้คนใช้คำให้เกียรติเมื่อถามเส้นทางหรือในสถาบันสาธารณะ นอกจากนี้คุณต้องใช้การให้เกียรติกับบุคคลที่สูงกว่าคุณในบริษัทด้วย ผู้คนใช้คำพูดที่ไม่เป็นทางการกับผู้ที่อายุน้อยกว่าพวกเขา อย่างไรก็ตาม แม้ว่าพวกเขาจะอายุมากกว่าคุณ คุณก็สามารถพูดอย่างไม่เป็นทางการกับเพื่อนสนิทหรือพี่น้องของคุณได้

g_text_translate.hi:
कोरियाई में सम्मानसूचक और अनौपचारिक भाषण हैं। आपको वृद्ध लोगों के लिए सम्मानसूचक शब्दों का प्रयोग करना चाहिए। इसलिए कोरियाई लोगों के लिए दूसरों की उम्र जानना बहुत ज़रूरी है। आपको उन लोगों के लिए भी सम्मानसूचक शब्दों का उपयोग करना चाहिए जिनसे आप पहली बार मिलते हैं। इसीलिए लोग दिशानिर्देश मांगते समय या सार्वजनिक संस्थानों में सम्मानसूचक शब्दों का उपयोग करते हैं। साथ ही, आपको कंपनी में अपने से ऊंचे पद के लोगों के लिए सम्मानसूचक शब्दों का प्रयोग करना होगा। लोग अपने से छोटे लोगों के लिए अनौपचारिक भाषण का उपयोग करते हैं। हालाँकि, भले ही वे आपसे बड़े हों, आप अपने करीबी दोस्तों या भाइयों से अनौपचारिक रूप से बात कर सकते हैं।

#######

You should also use honorifics to people you meet for the first time. That's why people use honorifics when asking for directions or in public institutions. Also, you have to use honorifics to people who are higher than you in the company. People use informal speech to people who are younger than them. However, even if they are older than you, you can speak informally to your close friends or brothers.
g_text_translate.tr:
Korece'de saygı ifadeleri ve resmi olmayan konuşmalar vardır. Yaşlı insanlara saygı ifadesi kullanmalısınız. Bu yüzden Korelilerin başkalarının yaşını bilmesi çok önemlidir. İlk kez tanıştığınız insanlara da saygı ifadesi kullanmalısınız. Bu yüzden insanlar yol tarifi isterken veya kamu kurumlarında saygı ifadesi kullanırlar. Ayrıca şirkette sizden daha yüksek mevkideki kişilere karşı da saygı ifadesi kullanmalısınız. İnsanlar kendilerinden daha genç olan kişilere karşı resmi olmayan konuşmalar kullanırlar. Ancak sizden büyük olsalar bile yakın arkadaşlarınız veya erkek kardeşlerinizle resmi olmayan bir şekilde konuşabilirsiniz.

#######

There are honorifics and informal speech in Korean. You should use honorifics to older people. So it is very important for Koreans to know the age of others. You should also use honorifics to people you meet for the first time. That's why people use honorifics when asking for directions or in public institutions. Also, you have to use honorifics to people who are higher than you in the company. People use informal speech to people who are younger than them. However, even if they are older than you, you can speak informally to your close friends or brothers.
g_text_translate.ne: कोरियालीमा सम्मानजनक र अनौपचारिक भाषणहरू छन्। तपाईंले वृद्ध मानिसहरूलाई सम्मान प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ। त्यसैले कोरियालीहरूका लागि अरूको उमेर जान्न धेरै महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। तपाईंले पहिलो पटक भेट्नुहुने मानिसहरूलाई पनि सम्मानको प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ। यसैले मानिसहरूले निर्देशनहरू वा सार्वजनिक संस्थाहरूमा सोध्दा सम्मानको प्रयोग गर्छन्। साथै, तपाईले कम्पनीमा तपाई भन्दा उच्च व्यक्तिहरूलाई सम्मानित प्रयोग गर्नुपर्दछ। मानिसहरूले आफूभन्दा कम उमेरका मानिसहरूलाई अनौपचारिक बोली प्रयोग गर्छन्। यद्यपि, तिनीहरू तपाईंभन्दा जेठो भए तापनि, तपाईं आफ्ना नजिकका साथीहरू वा दाजुभाइहरूसँग अनौपचारिक रूपमा कुरा गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
g_text_translate.km: មានកិត្តិយស និងសុន្ទរកថាក្រៅផ្លូវការជាភាសាកូរ៉េ។ អ្នក​គួរ​ប្រើ​កិត្តិយស​ចំពោះ​មនុស្ស​ចាស់។ ដូច្នេះវាមានសារៈសំខាន់ខ្លាំងណាស់សម្រាប់ជនជាតិកូរ៉េក្នុងការដឹងពីអាយុរបស់អ្នកដទៃ។ អ្នក​ក៏​គួរ​ប្រើ​កិត្តិយស​ចំពោះ​មនុស្ស​ដែល​អ្នក​ជួប​ជា​លើក​ដំបូង។ នោះហើយជាមូលហេតុដែលមនុស្សប្រើកិត្តិយសនៅពេលសុំការណែនាំឬនៅក្នុងស្ថាប័នសាធារណៈ។ ម្យ៉ាងទៀត អ្នក​ត្រូវ​ប្រើ​កិត្តិយស​ចំពោះ​មនុស្ស​ដែល​ខ្ពស់ជាង​អ្នក​នៅក្នុង​ក្រុមហ៊ុន។ មនុស្សប្រើការនិយាយក្រៅផ្លូវការទៅកាន់មនុស្សដែលក្មេងជាងពួកគេ។ ទោះជាយ៉ាងណាក៏ដោយ ទោះបីជាពួកគេចាស់ជាងអ្នកក៏ដោយ អ្នកអាចនិយាយក្រៅផ្លូវការជាមួយមិត្តភក្តិជិតស្និទ្ធ ឬបងប្អូនរបស់អ្នក។
g_text_translate.si: කොරියානු භාෂාවෙන් ගෞරවනීය සහ අවිධිමත් කථා ඇත. ඔබ වැඩිහිටි පුද්ගලයින්ට ගෞරව නාම භාවිතා කළ යුතුය. එබැවින් කොරියානුවන් අන් අයගේ වයස දැන ගැනීම ඉතා වැදගත් වේ. ඔබ පළමු වරට මුණගැසෙන පුද්ගලයින්ටද ඔබ ගෞරව නාම භාවිතා කළ යුතුය. ඒකයි මිනිස්සු පාර ඉල්ලනකොට හෝ පොදු ආයතනවල ගෞරව නාම පාවිච්චි කරන්නේ. ඒ වගේම කම්පැනි එකේ ඔයාට වඩා ඉහල අයට ගෞරව නාම භාවිතා කරන්න වෙනවා. මිනිසුන් තමන්ට වඩා වයසින් අඩු අයට අවිධිමත් කථනය භාවිතා කරයි. කෙසේ වෙතත්, ඔවුන් ඔබට වඩා වයසින් වැඩි වුවද, ඔබට ඔබේ සමීප මිතුරන් හෝ සහෝදරයන් සමඟ අවිධිමත් ලෙස කතා කළ හැකිය.
g_text_translate.bn: কোরিয়ান ভাষায় সম্মানসূচক এবং অনানুষ্ঠানিক বক্তৃতা রয়েছে। আপনি বয়স্ক ব্যক্তিদের সম্মান ব্যবহার করা উচিত. তাই কোরিয়ানদের জন্য অন্যদের বয়স জানা খুবই গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। আপনি প্রথমবার যাদের সাথে দেখা করেন তাদের জন্য আপনার সম্মানী ব্যবহার করা উচিত। এই কারণেই লোকেরা নির্দেশনা বা সরকারী প্রতিষ্ঠানে জিজ্ঞাসা করার সময় সম্মানী ব্যবহার করে। এছাড়াও, কোম্পানিতে আপনার চেয়ে উচ্চতর ব্যক্তিদের জন্য আপনাকে সম্মানী ব্যবহার করতে হবে। লোকেরা তাদের চেয়ে কম বয়সী লোকেদের কাছে অনানুষ্ঠানিক বক্তৃতা ব্যবহার করে। যাইহোক, তারা আপনার থেকে বড় হলেও, আপনি আপনার ঘনিষ্ঠ বন্ধু বা ভাইদের সাথে অনানুষ্ঠানিকভাবে কথা বলতে পারেন।
g_text_translate.my: ကိုရီးယားလို ဂုဏ်ပြုစကားတွေနဲ့ အလွတ်သဘော ပြောဆိုတာတွေရှိတယ်။ လူကြီးတွေကို ဂုဏ်ပြုတဲ့အနေနဲ့ သုံးသင့်ပါတယ်။ ထို့ကြောင့် ကိုရီးယားလူမျိုးများသည် အခြားသူများ၏အသက်ကို သိရန် အလွန်အရေးကြီးပါသည်။ သင်ပထမဆုံးအကြိမ်တွေ့ဆုံသောလူများကို ဂုဏ်ပြုသည့်အနေဖြင့်လည်း အသုံးပြုသင့်သည်။ အဲဒါကြောင့် လူတွေက လမ်းညွှန်ချက်တောင်းတဲ့အခါ ဒါမှမဟုတ် အစိုးရအဖွဲ့အစည်းတွေမှာ ဂုဏ်ပြုစာတွေ သုံးကြတယ်။ ဒါ့အပြင် ကုမ္ပဏီမှာ မင်းထက် မြင့်တဲ့သူတွေကို ဂုဏ်ပြုတဲ့အနေနဲ့ သုံးရမယ်။ လူတွေက သူတို့ထက်ငယ်တဲ့လူတွေကို အလွတ်သဘောစကားပြောလေ့ရှိပါတယ်။ သို့သော် ၎င်းတို့သည် သင့်ထက်အသက်ကြီးသော်လည်း သင်၏ရင်းနှီးသောမိတ်ဆွေများ သို့မဟုတ် ညီအစ်ကိုများကို အလွတ်သဘောပြောဆိုနိုင်သည်။

content.q_text: 나는 30살입니다. 다음 중 내가 꼭 높임말을 쓰지 않아도 되는 사람은 누구입니까?

explain.vi:
Năm nay tôi 30 tuổi. Tôi không cần thiết phải dùng kính ngữ với người nào trong những người sau?

1. Mẹ của bạn tôi 
2. Đồng nghiệp mới gặp
3. Người anh thân thiết 32 tuổi
4. Cô chủ cửa hàng khoảng 50 tuổi
-------------------- 
괜찮다: Được, không sao, không vấn đề
한테: Với, đối với

A + (으)ㄴ + N: Định ngữ của tính từ.
N + (이)나: Hoặc.
N1 + 보다 + N2: So với N1 thì N2 (hơn, kém).

Có thể dùng lối nói ngang hàng với người thân với mình dù người đó hơn tuổi nên đáp án đúng là 3.
explain.en:
I am 30 years old. Who do I not have to use honorifics with?

1. My friend's mother
2. A business colleague I met for the first time
3. My 32-year-old older brother who is close to me
4. A shop owner in her 50s
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> To be fine, to be nice
<g>한테:</g> To, for

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> Noun modifier (for adjectives).
<g>N + (이)나:</g> Or.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> Compared to <g>N1</g>, <g>N2</g> is ...

You can use informal speech with whom is close to you, even though that person is older, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.it:

4. Proprietaria di un negozio sulla cinquantina
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g>Stare bene, stare bene
<g>한테:</g>A, per

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g>Modificatore sostantivo (per aggettivi).
<g>N + (이)나:</g>O.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g>Rispetto a<g>N1</g>,<g>N2</g>è ...

Puoi usare un discorso informale con chi ti è vicino, anche se quella persona è più anziana, quindi la risposta corretta è 3.

#######

I am 30 years old. Who do I not have to use honorifics with?

आप अनौपचारिक भाषण का उपयोग उस व्यक्ति के साथ कर सकते हैं जो आपके करीब है, भले ही वह व्यक्ति बड़ा हो, इसलिए सही उत्तर 3 है।

#######

I am 30 years old. Who do I not have to use honorifics with?

1. My friend's mother
2. A business colleague I met for the first time
3. My 32-year-old older brother who is close to me
4. A shop owner in her 50s
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> To be fine, to be nice
<g>한테:</g> To, for

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> Noun modifier (for adjectives).
<g>N + (이)나:</g> Or.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> Compared to <g>N1</g>, <g>N2</g> is ...

You can use informal speech with whom is close to you, even though that person is older, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.tr:
30 yaşındayım. Kimin yanında saygı ifadesi kullanmak zorunda değilim?

1. Arkadaşımın annesi
2. İlk kez tanıştığım bir iş arkadaşım
3. Yakınım olan 32 yaşındaki ağabeyim
4. 50'li yaşlarında bir dükkan sahibi
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g>İyi olmak, güzel olmak
<g>한테:</g>için, için

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g>İsim değiştirici (sıfatlar için).
<g>N + (이)나:</g>Veya.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g>Nazaran<g>N1</g>,<g>N2</g>dır-dir ...

Yakınınızdaki kişi daha yaşlı olsa bile resmi olmayan konuşmayı kullanabilirsiniz, dolayısıyla doğru cevap 3'tür.

#######

I am 30 years old. Who do I not have to use honorifics with?

1. My friend's mother
2. A business colleague I met for the first time
3. My 32-year-old older brother who is close to me
4. A shop owner in her 50s
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> To be fine, to be nice
<g>한테:</g> To, for

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> Noun modifier (for adjectives).
<g>N + (이)나:</g> Or.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> Compared to <g>N1</g>, <g>N2</g> is ...

You can use informal speech with whom is close to you, even though that person is older, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.ne:
म ३० वर्षको भएँ। मैले कोसँग सम्मान प्रयोग गर्नुपर्दैन?

1. मेरो साथीको आमा
2. मैले पहिलो पटक भेटेको एक व्यापारिक सहकर्मी
3. मेरो 32 वर्षीय जेठो भाइ जो मेरो नजिक छ
4. उनको 50 को दशक मा एक पसल मालिक
----------------------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> राम्रो हुन, राम्रो हुन
<g>한테:</g> को, को लागी

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> संज्ञा परिमार्जनकर्ता (विशेषणहरूको लागि)।
<g>N + (이)나:</g> वा।
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> <g>N1</g> को तुलनामा, <g>N2</g> हो ...

तपाईले अनौपचारिक भाषण प्रयोग गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ जससँग तपाई नजिक हुनुहुन्छ, यद्यपि त्यो व्यक्ति ठूलो छ, त्यसैले सही उत्तर 3 हो।
explain.km:
ខ្ញុំមានអាយុ 30 ឆ្នាំ។ តើខ្ញុំមិនត្រូវប្រើកិត្តិយសជាមួយអ្នកណា?

1. ម្តាយរបស់មិត្តរបស់ខ្ញុំ
2. មិត្តរួមការងារជំនួញដែលខ្ញុំបានជួបជាលើកដំបូង
3. បងប្រុសរបស់ខ្ញុំអាយុ 32 ឆ្នាំដែលជិតស្និទ្ធនឹងខ្ញុំ
4. ម្ចាស់ហាងក្នុងវ័យ 50 ឆ្នាំ។
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> ល្អ ស្អាត
<g>한테:</g> ទៅ, សម្រាប់

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> ការកែប្រែនាម (សម្រាប់គុណនាម)។
<g>N + (이)나:</g> ឬ។
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2៖</g> បើប្រៀបធៀបទៅនឹង <g>N1</g> <g>N2</g> គឺ ...

អ្នក​អាច​ប្រើ​ការ​និយាយ​ក្រៅផ្លូវការ​ជាមួយ​អ្នក​ដែល​ស្និទ្ធស្នាល​នឹង​អ្នក ទោះបីជា​អ្នក​នោះ​មាន​វ័យ​ចំណាស់​ក៏ដោយ ដូច្នេះ​ចម្លើយ​ត្រឹមត្រូវ​គឺ 3 ។
explain.si:
මට වයස අවුරුදු 30 යි. මට ගෞරව නාම භාවිතා කිරීමට අවශ්‍ය නොවන්නේ කා සමඟද?

1. මගේ මිතුරාගේ මව
2. මට පළමු වරට මුණගැසුණු ව්‍යාපාරික සගයෙක්
3. මට සමීප මගේ 32 හැවිරිදි වැඩිමහල් සහෝදරයා
4. 50 ගණන්වල කඩ හිමියෙක්
----------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> හොඳින් සිටීමට, හොඳ වීමට
<g>한테:</g> වෙත, සඳහා

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> නාම පද වෙනස් කරන්නා (විශේෂණ සඳහා).
<g>N + (이)나:</g> හෝ.
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> <g>N1</g> හා සසඳන විට, <g>N2</g> යනු ...

ඔබට සමීප පුද්ගලයා සමඟ අවිධිමත් කථාව භාවිතා කළ හැකිය, එම පුද්ගලයා වයසින් වැඩි වුවද, නිවැරදි පිළිතුර 3 වේ.
explain.bn:
আমি 30 বছর বয়সী. আমি কার সাথে সম্মানী ব্যবহার করতে হবে না?

1. আমার বন্ধুর মা
2. একজন ব্যবসায়িক সহকর্মীর সাথে আমি প্রথমবার দেখা করেছি৷
3. আমার 32 বছর বয়সী বড় ভাই যে আমার খুব কাছের
4. তার 50 এর দশকের একজন দোকানের মালিক
-----------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> ভালো থাকতে, সুন্দর হতে
<g>한테:</g> প্রতি, জন্য

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> বিশেষ্য পরিবর্তনকারী (বিশেষণগুলির জন্য)।
<g>N + (이)나:</g> অথবা।
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> <g>N1</g> এর তুলনায়, <g>N2</g> হল ...

আপনার কাছাকাছি যার সাথে আপনি অনানুষ্ঠানিক বক্তৃতা ব্যবহার করতে পারেন, যদিও সেই ব্যক্তি বয়স্ক, তাই সঠিক উত্তর হল 3।
explain.my:
ငါအသက် 30 ပါ။ ဘယ်သူတွေနဲ့ ဂုဏ်ပြုစရာ မလိုဘူးလဲ။

1. ငါ့သူငယ်ချင်းရဲ့အမေ
၂။ ပထမဆုံး အကြိမ် တွေ့ဖူးတဲ့ စီးပွားရေး လုပ်ဖော်ကိုင်ဖက် တစ်ယောက်
3. ကျွန်ုပ်နှင့်ရင်းနှီးသော အသက် 32 နှစ်အရွယ် အကိုကြီး
4. အသက် 50 ဝန်းကျင်ရှိ ဆိုင်ပိုင်ရှင်
--------------------
<g>괜찮다:</g> နေကောင်းရန်၊ ချစ်စရာကောင်းသည်။
<g>한테:</g> To, for

<g>A + (으)ㄴ:</g> နာမ်မွမ်းမံမှု (နာမဝိသေသနများအတွက်)။
<g>N + (이)나:</g> သို့မဟုတ်။
<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> <g>N1</g> နှင့် နှိုင်းယှဉ်ပါက <g>N2</g> သည် ...

ထိုလူသည် အသက်ကြီးသော်လည်း သင်နှင့်နီးစပ်သူနှင့် အလွတ်သဘောစကားပြောဆိုနိုင်သည်၊ ထို့ကြောင့် အဖြေမှန်မှာ 3 ဖြစ်သည်။

general.g_text: 저는 어제 한국 친구와 같이 <청계천>을 구경하러 갔습니다. <청계천>은 서울 시내에 있는 하천인데, 1970년쯤 시멘트를 덮어 도로로 만들었습니다. 그래서 30년 이상 그 위로 자동차가 지나다녔습니다. 그런데 2005년에 도로를 없애고 다시 하천으로 만들었습니다. 그래서 지금은 물을 볼 수 있게 되었습니다. 지금 <청계천>에는 맑은 물이 흐르고, 그 물에서 아이들이 놀고 있습니다. 그리고 그 주변을 아주 아름답게 만들어서 많은 사람들이 구경을 하러 옵니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm qua tôi đã cùng người bạn Hàn Quốc của mình đến tham quan suối Cheonggyecheon. Cheonggyecheon là con suối nằm trong nội thành Seoul nhưng vào khoảng năm 1970, nó đã được tráng xi măng và làm thành một con đường. Vì vậy mà ô tô đã chạy trên đó hơn ba mươi năm. Nhưng từ năm 2005, con đường đã bị dỡ bỏ và được làm thành suối một lần nữa. Vì vậy bây giờ người ta lại có thể được nhìn thấy nước ở đó. Bây giờ ở suối Cheonggyecheon, dòng nước trong xanh đang chảy qua, và trẻ em nô đùa trong làn nước đó. Và người ta làm xung quanh trở nên rất đẹp nên cũng có nhiều người tới đây tham quan.
g_text_translate.en: Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.it:
Ieri sono andato a vedere <Cheonggyecheon> con il mio amico coreano. <Cheonggyecheon> è un corso d'acqua nel centro di Seoul. Intorno al 1970 fu ricoperto di cemento e trasformato in strada. Quindi per più di 30 anni le auto ci sono passate sopra. Tuttavia, nel 2005, la strada è stata rimossa e trasformata nuovamente in un fiume. Così ora posso vedere l'acqua. Ora c'è acqua limpida che scorre in <Cheonggyecheon> e i bambini giocano nell'acqua. E rendono l'ambiente così bello che molte persone vengono a vederli.

#######

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.fr:
Hier, je suis allé voir <Cheonggyecheon> avec mon ami coréen. <Cheonggyecheon> est un ruisseau du centre-ville de Séoul. Vers 1970, il a été recouvert de ciment et transformé en route. Ainsi depuis plus de 30 ans, les voitures y passent. Cependant, en 2005, la route a été supprimée et transformée à nouveau en rivière. Alors maintenant, je peux voir l'eau. Maintenant, il y a de l'eau claire qui coule à <Cheonggyecheon>, et des enfants jouent dans l'eau. Et ils rendent les environs si beaux que beaucoup de gens viennent les voir.

#######

So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.es:
Ayer fui a ver a <Cheonggyecheon> con mi amigo coreano. <Cheonggyecheon> es un arroyo en el centro de Seúl. Alrededor de 1970, se cubrió con cemento y se convirtió en un camino. Por eso, durante más de 30 años, los automóviles han pasado por encima de él. Sin embargo, en 2005, la carretera se eliminó y se convirtió nuevamente en un río. Así que ahora puedo ver el agua. Ahora, hay agua clara fluyendo en <Cheonggyecheon>, y los niños juegan en el agua. Y hacen que el entorno sea tan bonito que mucha gente viene a verlos.

#######

So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.id:
Kemarin, saya pergi menemui <Cheonggyecheon> dengan teman Korea saya. <Cheonggyecheon> adalah sungai di pusat kota Seoul. Sekitar tahun 1970 ditutup dengan semen dan dibuat jalan. Jadi selama lebih dari 30 tahun, mobil telah melewatinya. Namun, pada tahun 2005, jalan tersebut dihilangkan dan dijadikan sungai kembali. Jadi sekarang saya bisa melihat air. Sekarang, ada air jernih yang mengalir di <Cheonggyecheon>, dan anak-anak bermain di air. Dan mereka membuat lingkungannya begitu indah sehingga banyak orang datang untuk melihatnya.

g_text_translate.ja:
昨日、韓国人の友達と<清渓川>を見に行きました。 <清渓川>はソウルの都心にある小川です。 1970年頃、セメントで覆って道路にしました。そのため、30 年以上にわたって車が通り過ぎてきました。しかし、2005年に道路は撤去され、再び川になった。これで水が見えるようになりました。今、清渓川には澄んだ水が流れ、子供たちが水遊びをしている。そして周囲を美しく彩り、多くの人が見に来ます。

So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. g_text_translate.de:
Gestern war ich mit meinem koreanischen Freund bei <Cheonggyecheon>. <Cheonggyecheon> ist ein Bach in der Innenstadt von Seoul. Um 1970 wurde er mit Zement bedeckt und zu einer Straße ausgebaut. Seit mehr als 30 Jahren fahren Autos darüber. Im Jahr 2005 wurde die Straße jedoch entfernt und wieder in einen Fluss umgewandelt. Jetzt kann ich also das Wasser sehen. Jetzt fließt klares Wasser in <Cheonggyecheon> und Kinder spielen im Wasser. Und sie machen die Umgebung so schön, dass viele Menschen kommen, um sie zu sehen.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
昨天和韩国朋友去看了<清溪川>。 <清溪川>是首尔市中心的一条溪流。 1970年左右，用水泥盖上，修成马路。所以30多年来，汽车从它上面驶过。然而，在2005年，这条路被拆除并重新变成了一条河流。所以现在我可以看到水了。现在，<清溪川>流淌着清澈的水，孩子们在水中嬉戏。他们使周围环境如此美丽，以至于有很多人来看他们。

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
昨天和韓國朋友去看了<清溪川>。 <清溪川>是首爾市中心的一條溪流。 1970年左右，用水泥蓋上，修成馬路。所以30多年來，汽車從它上面駛過。然而，在2005年，這條路被拆除並重新變成了一條河流。所以現在我可以看到水了。現在，<清溪川>流淌著清澈的水，孩子們在水中嬉戲。他們使周圍環境如此美麗，以至於有很多人來看他們。

#######

So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.ru:
Вчера я ходил на «Чхонгечхон» со своим корейским другом. «Чхонгечхон» — ручей в центре Сеула. Примерно в 1970 году его замазали цементом и превратили в дорогу. Так вот уже более 30 лет по нему проезжают автомобили. Однако в 2005 году дорогу снесли и снова превратили в реку. Итак, теперь я вижу воду. Теперь в «Чхонгечхоне» течет чистая вода, и в воде играют дети. И они делают окрестности настолько красивыми, что посмотреть на них приходит множество людей.

g_text_translate.th:
เมื่อวานฉันไปดู <ชองกเยชอน> กับเพื่อนชาวเกาหลี <ชองกเยชอน> เป็นลำธารในใจกลางกรุงโซล ประมาณปี 1970 มันถูกปูด้วยซีเมนต์และทำเป็นถนน ดังนั้นกว่า 30 ปี รถยนต์จึงผ่านไป อย่างไรก็ตามในปี พ.ศ. 2548 ถนนได้ถูกรื้อออกและกลายเป็นแม่น้ำอีกครั้ง ตอนนี้ฉันมองเห็นน้ำแล้ว ตอนนี้มีน้ำใสไหลใน <Cheonggyecheon> และเด็กๆ ก็เล่นน้ำกัน และทำให้สภาพแวดล้อมสวยงามจนผู้คนจำนวนมากมาเห็น

#######

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.pt:
Ontem fui ver <Cheonggyecheon> com meu amigo coreano. <Cheonggyecheon> é um riacho no centro de Seul. Por volta de 1970, foi coberto com cimento e transformado em estrada. Então, por mais de 30 anos, os carros passaram por cima dele. Porém, em 2005, a estrada foi removida e transformada novamente em rio. Então agora posso ver a água. Agora, há água limpa fluindo em <Cheonggyecheon> e crianças estão brincando na água. E tornam o ambiente tão bonito que muitas pessoas vêm vê-los.

#######

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.hi:
कल, मैं अपने कोरियाई मित्र के साथ <Cheonggyecheon> देखने गया था। <Cheonggyecheon> सियोल शहर में एक धारा है। 1970 के आसपास इसे सीमेंट से ढककर सड़क बना दी गई। इसलिए 30 से अधिक वर्षों से कारें इसके ऊपर से गुजरती रही हैं। हालाँकि, 2005 में, सड़क को हटा दिया गया और फिर से नदी बना दिया गया। तो अब मैं पानी देख सकता हूँ। अब, <चेओंगगीचेओन> में साफ पानी बह रहा है, और बच्चे पानी में खेल रहे हैं। और आसपास के माहौल को इतना खूबसूरत बना देते हैं कि कई लोग इन्हें देखने आते हैं।

#######

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.tr:
Dün Koreli arkadaşımla <Cheonggyecheon>'u görmeye gittim. <Cheonggyecheon> Seul şehir merkezinde bir akarsu. 1970'li yıllarda üzeri çimentoyla kapatılarak yol haline getirildi. Yani 30 yılı aşkın süredir üzerinden arabalar geçti. Ancak 2005 yılında yol kaldırılarak yeniden nehre dönüştürüldü. Artık suyu görebiliyorum. Artık <Cheonggyecheon>'da temiz su akıyor ve çocuklar suda oynuyor. Ve çevreyi o kadar güzelleştiriyorlar ki pek çok insan onları görmeye geliyor.

#######

Yesterday, I went to see <Cheonggyecheon> with my Korean friend. <Cheonggyecheon> is a stream in downtown Seoul. Around 1970, it was covered with cement and made into a road. So for more than 30 years, cars have passed over it. However, in 2005, the road was removed and made into a river again. So now I can see the water. Now, there is clear water flowing in <Cheonggyecheon>, and children are playing in the water. And they make the surroundings so beautiful that many people come to see them.
g_text_translate.ne: हिजो, म मेरो कोरियाली साथीसँग <Cheonggyecheon> हेर्न गएँ। <Cheonggyecheon> सियोल शहरको एउटा स्ट्रिम हो। 1970 को आसपास, यसलाई सिमेन्टले छोपेर सडक बनाइएको थियो। त्यसोभए 30 वर्ष भन्दा बढीको लागि, कारहरू यसमाथि बितिसकेका छन्। तर, सन् २००५ मा सडक हटाएर फेरि खोला बनाइयो । त्यसैले अब म पानी देख्न सक्छु। अहिले <Cheonggyecheon> मा सफा पानी बगिरहेको छ, र बच्चाहरू पानीमा खेलिरहेका छन्। र तिनीहरूले वरपर यति सुन्दर बनाउँछन् कि धेरै मानिसहरू तिनीहरूलाई हेर्न आउँछन्।
g_text_translate.km: ម្សិលមិញ ខ្ញុំបានទៅមើល <Cheonggyecheon> ជាមួយមិត្តកូរ៉េរបស់ខ្ញុំ។ <Cheonggyecheon> គឺជាស្ទ្រីមមួយនៅកណ្តាលទីក្រុងសេអ៊ូល។ ប្រហែលឆ្នាំ 1970 វាត្រូវបានគ្របដោយស៊ីម៉ងត៍ ហើយធ្វើជាផ្លូវ។ ដូច្នេះអស់រយៈពេលជាង 30 ឆ្នាំមកហើយរថយន្តបានឆ្លងកាត់វា។ ទោះ​ជា​យ៉ាង​ណា​ក៏​ដោយ នៅ​ឆ្នាំ ២០០៥ ផ្លូវ​នេះ​ត្រូវ​បាន​គេ​យក​ចេញ ហើយ​ធ្វើ​ជា​ទន្លេ​ម្ដង​ទៀត។ ដូច្នេះឥឡូវនេះខ្ញុំអាចមើលឃើញទឹក។ ឥឡូវនេះ មានទឹកថ្លាៗហូរចូល <Cheonggyecheon> ហើយក្មេងៗកំពុងលេងក្នុងទឹក។ ហើយ​ពួក​គេ​បាន​ធ្វើ​ឱ្យ​អ្នក​នៅ​ជុំវិញ​នោះ​ស្រស់​ស្អាត​រហូត​មាន​មនុស្ស​ជា​ច្រើន​មក​មើល​ពួកគេ។
g_text_translate.si: ඊයේ, මම මගේ කොරියානු මිතුරෙකු සමඟ <Cheonggyecheon> බලන්න ගියා. <Cheonggyecheon> යනු සෝල් නගරයේ පිහිටි ප්‍රවාහයකි. 1970 දී පමණ එය සිමෙන්තිවලින් ආවරණය කර මාර්ගයක් බවට පත් කරන ලදී. එබැවින් වසර 30 කට වැඩි කාලයක් මෝටර් රථ එය හරහා ගමන් කර ඇත. නමුත් 2005 දී මාර්ගය ඉවත් කර නැවත ගඟක් බවට පත් කළා. ඉතින් දැන් මට වතුර පේනවා. දැන්, <Cheonggyecheon> හි පැහැදිලි ජලය ගලා යන අතර, ළමයින් ජලයේ සෙල්ලම් කරති. ඒවගේම ඔවුන් වටපිටාව කොච්චර ලස්සන කරනවාද කියනවා නම් ගොඩක් අය ඒවා බලන්න එනවා.
g_text_translate.bn: গতকাল, আমি আমার কোরিয়ান বন্ধুর সাথে <Cheonggyecheon> দেখতে গিয়েছিলাম। <Cheonggyecheon> হল সিউল শহরের কেন্দ্রস্থলে একটি স্রোত। 1970 সালের দিকে, এটি সিমেন্ট দিয়ে আচ্ছাদিত এবং একটি রাস্তা তৈরি করা হয়েছিল। সুতরাং 30 বছরেরও বেশি সময় ধরে, গাড়িগুলি এটির উপর দিয়ে চলে গেছে। তবে 2005 সালে রাস্তাটি সরিয়ে আবার নদীতে পরিণত করা হয়। তাই এখন পানি দেখতে পাচ্ছি। এখন, <Cheonggyecheon> এ স্বচ্ছ পানি প্রবাহিত হচ্ছে, এবং শিশুরা পানিতে খেলছে। এবং তারা চারপাশকে এত সুন্দর করে তোলে যে অনেক লোক তাদের দেখতে আসে।
g_text_translate.my: မနေ့က ကျွန်မရဲ့ ကိုရီးယားသူငယ်ချင်းနဲ့ <Cheonggyecheon> သွားကြည့်တယ်။ <Cheonggyecheon> သည် ဆိုးလ်မြို့လယ်ရှိ စမ်းချောင်းတစ်ခုဖြစ်သည်။ 1970 ခုနှစ်လောက်က ဘိလပ်မြေနဲ့ ကာပြီး လမ်းဖြစ်အောင် လုပ်တယ်။ ဒီလိုနဲ့ နှစ် 30 ကျော် ကားတွေ ဖြတ်ကျော်လာခဲ့တယ်။ သို့သော်လည်း ၂၀၀၅ ခုနှစ်တွင် အဆိုပါလမ်းကို ဖယ်ရှားခဲ့ပြီး မြစ်ထဲသို့ တစ်ဖန်ပြန်လည်တည်ဆောက်ခဲ့သည်။ ဒါကြောင့် အခုရေကိုမြင်နေရပြီ။ ယခု <Cheonggyecheon> တွင် ကြည်လင်သောရေများ စီးဆင်းနေပြီး ကလေးငယ်များ ရေကစားနေကြသည်။ ပတ်ဝန်းကျင်ကို လှလှပပဖြစ်အောင် ပြုလုပ်ထားသောကြောင့် လူအများ လာရောက်ကြည့်ရှု့ကြသည်။

general.g_text: 한국에서 가장 큰 명절은 ‘설날’과 ‘추석’입니다. 설날은 음력 1월 1일로, 새로운 해가 시작하는 것을 축하하는 날입니다. 이때 많은 사람들이 고향을 찾아갑니다. 설날 아침에는 조상들과 어른들께 인사를 드리고 떡국을 먹습니다. 추석은 음력 8월 15일로 계절은 가을입니다. 이때도 많은 사람들이 고향에 가서 가족과 친지들을 만납니다. 그 해에 새로 나온 곡식과 과일을 먹으면서 즐겁게 보냅니다. 추석에 먹는 특별한 음식은 송편입니다. 송편은 그 해에 새로 나온 쌀로 만든 떡입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ngày lễ lớn nhất trong năm ở Hàn Quốc là 'Tết Nguyên Đán' và 'Trung thu'. Tết Nguyên Đán là ngày mùng 1 tháng 1 âm lịch, là ngày chúc mừng một năm mới bắt đầu. Lúc này sẽ có rất nhiều người về thăm quê. Vào buổi sáng ngày Tết Nguyên Đán, người Hàn chào hỏi người lớn, cúng bái tổ tiên rồi ăn canh bánh gạo. Trung thu là ngày 15 tháng 8 âm lịch, là vào mùa thu. Lúc này rất nhiều người trở về quê để gặp gia đình và những người thân thiết. Mọi người vừa ăn ngũ cốc và hoa quả của năm đó và vui vẻ tận hưởng cùng nhau. Món ăn đặc biệt được ăn vào trung thu là bánh songpyeon. Songpyeon là bánh gạo được làm từ gạo mới làm ra trong năm đó.
g_text_translate.en: The biggest holidays in Korea are 'Lunar New Year' and 'Chuseok'. Lunar New Year is celebrated on the first day of the first lunar month and marks the start of a new year. At this time, many people go to their hometowns. On the morning of New Year's Day, they greet their ancestors and elders and eat rice cake soup. Chuseok is on the 15th day of the 8th lunar month, and the season is autumn. At this time, many people go back to their hometown to meet family and friends. They enjoy the new crops and fruits of the year. Songpyeon is a special food eaten during Chuseok. Songpyeon is a rice cake made from the new rice of the year.
g_text_translate.it:
Le festività più importanti in Corea sono il "Capodanno lunare" e il "Chuseok". Il capodanno lunare si celebra il primo giorno del primo mese lunare e segna l'inizio di un nuovo anno. In questo momento, molte persone vanno nelle loro città natale. La mattina del primo dell'anno, salutano i loro antenati e anziani e mangiano zuppa di torta di riso. Chuseok è il 15° giorno dell'8° mese lunare e la stagione è l'autunno. In questo momento, molte persone tornano nella loro città natale per incontrare familiari e amici. g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में सबसे बड़ी छुट्टियाँ 'चंद्र नव वर्ष' और 'चुसेओक' हैं। चंद्र नव वर्ष पहले चंद्र माह के पहले दिन मनाया जाता है और नए साल की शुरुआत का प्रतीक है। इस समय बहुत से लोग अपने गृहनगर जाते हैं। नए साल की सुबह, वे अपने पूर्वजों और बड़ों को बधाई देते हैं और चावल केक का सूप खाते हैं। चुसेओक 8वें चंद्र माह के 15वें दिन है, और मौसम शरद ऋतु है। इस समय, कई लोग परिवार और दोस्तों से मिलने के लिए अपने गृहनगर वापस जाते हैं। वे साल की नई फसलों और फलों का आनंद लेते हैं। सोंगपियोन चुसेओक के दौरान खाया जाने वाला एक विशेष भोजन है। सोंगपियोन एक चावल का केक है जो साल के नए चावल से बनाया जाता है।

g_text_translate.ne: कोरियामा सबैभन्दा ठूलो बिदाहरू 'चन्द्र नयाँ वर्ष' र 'चुसेओक' हुन्। चन्द्रमा नयाँ वर्ष पहिलो चन्द्र महिनाको पहिलो दिन मनाइन्छ र नयाँ वर्षको सुरुवातलाई चिन्ह लगाउँछ। यो समयमा धेरै मानिसहरु आफ्नो गाउँ जान्छन्। नयाँ वर्षको दिन बिहान, तिनीहरूले आफ्ना पुर्खाहरू र एल्डरहरूलाई अभिवादन गर्छन् र चामलको केक सुप खान्छन्। Chuseok 8 औं चन्द्र महिनाको 15 औं दिनमा छ, र मौसम शरद ऋतु हो। यस समयमा, धेरै मानिसहरू परिवार र साथीहरूलाई भेट्न आफ्नो गृहनगर फर्कन्छन्। उनीहरू वर्षको नयाँ बाली र फलफूलको आनन्द लिन्छन्। Songpyeon चुसेओक को समयमा खाएको एक विशेष खाना हो। Songpyeon वर्षको नयाँ चामलबाट बनेको चामलको केक हो।
g_text_translate.km: ថ្ងៃឈប់សម្រាកដ៏ធំបំផុតនៅក្នុងប្រទេសកូរ៉េគឺ 'បុណ្យចូលឆ្នាំថ្មី' និង 'Chuseok' ។ បុណ្យចូលឆ្នាំថ្មី ត្រូវបានប្រារព្ធនៅថ្ងៃដំបូងនៃខែទី 1 តាមច័ន្ទគតិ និងជាថ្ងៃចាប់ផ្តើមនៃឆ្នាំថ្មី។ នៅ​ពេល​នេះ មាន​មនុស្ស​ច្រើន​ទៅ​ស្រុក​កំណើត។ នៅ​ព្រឹក​ថ្ងៃ​ចូល​ឆ្នាំ គេ​សួរ​សុខ​ទុក្ខ​ដូន​តា​ចាស់​ជរា ហើយ​ញ៉ាំ​បាយ​សម្ល ។ Chuseok គឺនៅថ្ងៃទី 15 នៃខែទី 8 តាមច័ន្ទគតិហើយរដូវគឺរដូវស្លឹកឈើជ្រុះ។ នៅ​ពេល​នេះ មាន​មនុស្ស​ជា​ច្រើន​ត្រឡប់​ទៅ​ស្រុក​កំណើត​ដើម្បី​ជួប​ជុំ​ក្រុម​គ្រួសារ និង​មិត្តភ័ក្ដិ។ ពួកគេរីករាយនឹងដំណាំ និងផ្លែឈើថ្មីប្រចាំឆ្នាំ។ Songpyeon ជា​អាហារ​ពិសេស​ដែល​គេ​ទទួល​ទាន​ក្នុង​អំឡុង​ពេល Chuseok។ Songpyeon ជា​នំ​ដែល​ធ្វើ​ពី​អង្ករ​ថ្មី​ប្រចាំ​ឆ្នាំ។
g_text_translate.si: කොරියාවේ විශාලතම නිවාඩු දින වන්නේ 'චන්ද්ර අලුත් අවුරුද්ද' සහ 'චුසොක්' ය. චන්ද්‍ර අලුත් අවුරුද්ද පළමු චන්ද්‍ර මාසයේ පළමු දිනයේ සමරනු ලබන අතර එය නව වසරක ආරම්භය සනිටුහන් කරයි. මේ වෙලාවේ ගොඩක් අය තමන්ගේ ගම්බිම් බලා යනවා. අවුරුදු දවසේ උදේට මුතුන් මිත්තන්ට, වැඩිහිටියන්ට ආචාර කරලා බත් කැවුම් හොද්දක් කනවා. චුසොක් යනු 8 වන චන්ද්‍ර මාසයේ 15 වන දින වන අතර සමය සරත් සමයයි. මෙම අවස්ථාවේදී, බොහෝ අය තම පවුලේ අය සහ මිතුරන් හමුවීමට තම උපන් ගමට යති. ඔවුන් වසරේ නව භෝග සහ පලතුරු භුක්ති විඳිති. Songpyeon යනු Chuseok සමයේදී අනුභව කරන විශේෂ ආහාරයකි. Songpyeon යනු වසරේ අලුත් සහල් වලින් සාදන ලද සහල් කේක් ය.
g_text_translate.bn: কোরিয়ার সবচেয়ে বড় ছুটি হল 'লুনার নিউ ইয়ার' এবং 'চুসেওক'। চান্দ্র নববর্ষ প্রথম চান্দ্র মাসের প্রথম দিনে উদযাপিত হয় এবং একটি নতুন বছরের শুরু হয়। এ সময় অনেকেই নিজ শহরে চলে যান। নববর্ষের দিন সকালে, তারা তাদের পূর্বপুরুষ এবং প্রবীণদের শুভেচ্ছা জানায় এবং রাইস কেক স্যুপ খায়। চুসেওক 8ম চান্দ্র মাসের 15 তম দিনে, এবং ঋতু শরৎ। এ সময় অনেকে পরিবার ও বন্ধু-বান্ধবদের সঙ্গে দেখা করতে নিজ শহরে ফিরে যান। বছরের নতুন ফসল ও ফল তারা উপভোগ করে। Songpyeon চুসেওকের সময় খাওয়া একটি বিশেষ খাবার। Songpyeon হল বছরের নতুন চাল থেকে তৈরি একটি রাইস কেক।
g_text_translate.my: ကိုရီးယားတွင် အကြီးမားဆုံး အားလပ်ရက်များမှာ 'Lunar New Year' နှင့် 'Chuseok' တို့ဖြစ်သည်။ နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့ကို ပထမလ၏ ပထမနေ့တွင် ကျင်းပပြီး နှစ်သစ်၏ အစဖြစ်သည်။ ဒီအချိန်မှာ လူတော်တော်များများက ကိုယ့်မွေးရပ်မြေကို သွားနေကြတယ်။ နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့နံနက်တွင် ဘိုးဘွားစဉ်ဆက် သက်ကြီးရွယ်အိုများကို နှုတ်ဆက်ကြပြီး ထမင်းကိတ်စွပ်ပြုတ်စားကြသည်။ Chuseok သည် 8th လပိုင်း 15 ရက်နေ့ဖြစ်ပြီး ဆောင်းဦးရာသီဖြစ်သည်။ ယခုအချိန်တွင် မိသားစုနှင့် သူငယ်ချင်းများ တွေ့ဆုံရန် ဇာတိမြို့သို့ ပြန်လာသူ အများအပြားရှိသည်။ သူတို့သည် တစ်နှစ်တာ၏ အသီးအနှံများနှင့် သစ်သီးဝလံများကို နှစ်သက်ကြသည်။ Songpyeon သည် Chuseok တွင်စားသော အထူးအစားအစာဖြစ်သည်။ Songpyeon သည် တစ်နှစ်တာ၏ ထမင်းအသစ်မှ ပြုလုပ်ထားသော ထမင်းကိတ်တစ်ခုဖြစ်သည်။

content.q_text: 설날’에 대한 설명으로 맞지 않는 것을 고르십시오.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án giải thích không đúng về 'Tết Nguyên Đán'.

1. Diễn ra vào mùa thu.
2. Là ngày mùng 1 tháng 1 âm lịch.
3. Người ta ăn canh bánh gạo vào buổi sáng.
4. Nhiều người trở về quê.
-------------------- 
음력: Âm lịch
찾아가다: Về, đến, tìm đến
조상: Tổ tiên

V + (으)면서: Vừa … vừa (Hai hành động cùng xảy ra tại một thời điểm/một khoảng thời gian).

Tết Nguyên Đán là vào ngày mùng 1 tháng 1 âm lịch nên sẽ vào mùa xuân. Mùa thu sẽ có tết Trung thu.
explain.en:
Choose the one that does not fit the description of 'Lunar New Year'.

1. It is in the autumn.
2. It is the 1st day of the first lunar month.
3. People eat rice cake soup in the morning.
4. Many people go to their hometowns.
--------------------
<g>음력:</g> Lunar calendar
<g>찾아가다:</g> To visit
<g>조상:</g> Ancestor

<g>V + (으)면서:</g> While, and... too. 

Lunar New Year is on the 1st day of the 1st lunar month, so it will be in the spring.
explain.it:
Scegli quello che non corrisponde alla descrizione di "Capodanno lunare".

1. È in autunno.
2. È il primo giorno del primo mese lunare.
3. Le persone mangiano zuppa di torta di riso al mattino.
4. Molte persone vanno nelle loro città natale.
--------------------
<g>음력:</g>Calendario lunare
<g>찾아가다:</g>Visitare
<g>조상:</g>Antenato

<g>V + (으)면서:</g>Mentre, e... anche.

Il capodanno lunare è il primo giorno del primo mese lunare, quindi sarà in primavera.

explain.fr:
Choisissez celui qui ne correspond pas à la description du "Nouvel An lunaire".

<g>조상:</g>Ancêtre

Le Nouvel An lunaire est le 1er jour du 1er mois lunaire, donc ce sera au printemps.

El Año Nuevo Lunar es el primer día del primer mes lunar, por lo que será en primavera.

explain.id:
Pilih salah satu yang tidak sesuai dengan deskripsi 'Tahun Baru Imlek'.

explain.ja:
「旧正月」の説明に当てはまらないものを 1 つ選んでください。

explain.km:
ជ្រើសរើសមួយដែលមិនសមនឹងការពិពណ៌នានៃ 'បុណ្យចូលឆ្នាំថ្មី' ។

1. វាស្ថិតនៅក្នុងរដូវស្លឹកឈើជ្រុះ។
២.ជា​ថ្ងៃ​១​រោច ខែ​ភទ្របទ។
3. មនុស្សញ៉ាំបាយស៊ុបនៅពេលព្រឹក។
4. មនុស្សជាច្រើនទៅស្រុកកំណើត។
--------------------
<g>음력:</g> ប្រតិទិនចន្ទគតិ
<g>찾아가다៖</g> ដើម្បីទស្សនា
<g>조상:</g> បុព្វបុរស

<g>V + (으)면서:</g> ខណៈពេល និង... ផងដែរ។

បុណ្យចូលឆ្នាំថ្មីគឺនៅថ្ងៃ 1 កើតខែទី 1 ដូច្នេះវានឹងនៅនិទាឃរដូវ។
explain.si:
'චන්ද්‍ර අලුත් අවුරුද්ද' විස්තරයට නොගැලපෙන එකක් තෝරන්න.

1. එය සරත් සෘතුවේ දී ය.
2. එය පළමු චන්ද්ර මාසයේ 1 වන දිනයයි.
3. මිනිස්සු උදේට බත් කැවුම් හොද්ද කනවා.
4. බොහෝ අය තම ගම්බිම් බලා යති.
----------------------
<g>음력:</g> චන්ද්‍ර දින දර්ශනය
<g>찾아가다:</g> සංචාරය කිරීමට
<g>조상:</g> මුතුන් මිත්තන්

<g>V + (으)면서:</g> අතර, සහ... ද.

චන්ද්ර අලුත් අවුරුද්ද 1 වන චන්ද්ර මාසයේ 1 වන දින, එබැවින් එය වසන්තයේ වනු ඇත.
explain.bn:
'লুনার নিউ ইয়ার'-এর বর্ণনার সাথে খাপ খায় না এমন একটি বেছে নিন।

1. এটি শরৎকালে।
2. এটি প্রথম চান্দ্র মাসের ১ম দিন।
3. সকালে মানুষ রাইস কেক স্যুপ খায়।
4. অনেক লোক তাদের নিজ শহরে যায়।
------------------
<g>음력:</g> চন্দ্র ক্যালেন্ডার
<g>찾아가다:</g> দেখার জন্য
<g>조상:</g> পূর্বপুরুষ

<g>V + (으)면서:</g> যখন, এবং...ও।

চন্দ্র নববর্ষ ১ম চান্দ্র মাসের ১ম দিনে, তাই এটি বসন্তে হবে।
explain.my:
'Lunar New Year' ၏ ဖော်ပြချက်နှင့် မကိုက်ညီသော တစ်ခုကို ရွေးပါ။

1. အဲဒါက ဆောင်းဦး။
၂။ ပဌမလ၏ ၁ရက်မြောက်နေ့။
၃။ လူတွေက မနက်ခင်းမှာ ထမင်းကိတ်စွပ်ပြုတ်စားတယ်။
4. လူများစွာသည် ၎င်းတို့၏ မွေးရပ်မြေသို့ သွားကြသည်။
--------------------
<g>음력:</g> လပြက္ခဒိန်
<g>찾아가다:</g> သွားရောက်ကြည့်ရှုရန်
<g>조상:</g> ဘိုးဘေး

<g>V + (으)면서:</g> နေစဉ်၊ နှင့်...

နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့သည် စန္ဒြလ ၁ ရက်နေ့ ဖြစ်သောကြောင့် နွေဦးရာသီ ဖြစ်မည်။

general.g_text: 음력 8월 15일은 추석입니다. 올 추석은 양력으로 10월 6일입니다. 이날은 멀리 떨어져 사는 가족들이 모두 모입니다. 그리고 그 해에 새로 나온 쌀로 송편을 만들고 그 해에 추수한 곡식과 과일로 맛있는 음식을 준비합니다. 추석날 아침에는 차례상을 준비하여 돌아가신 조상들에게 절을 합니다. 차례가 끝난 후에는 성묘를 가거나 음식을 먹으면서 이야기를 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ngày 15 tháng 8 âm lịch là tết Trung thu. Trung thu năm nay là ngày 6 tháng 10 dương lịch. Các thành viên sống xa nhau trong gia đình tụ tập quây quần bên nhau vào ngày này. Và người Hàn Quốc làm bánh Songpyeon từ gạo mới thu hoạch trong năm đó, và làm những món ăn ngon bằng ngũ cốc và hoa quả thu hoạch năm đó. Vào buổi sáng ngày tết Trung thu, người Hàn Quốc chuẩn bị lễ cúng và cúi lạy tổ tiên đã qua đời. Sau khi lễ kết thúc, họ đi tảo mộ hoặc vừa ăn uống vừa trò chuyện cùng nhau.
g_text_translate.en: The 15th day of the 8th lunar month is Chuseok. This year, Chuseok falls on October 6 in the Gregorian calendar. On this day, all family members who live far away gather together. Songpyeon is made with the new rice of the year, and delicious food is prepared with the grains and fruits harvested that year. On the morning of Chuseok, people prepare a table for ancestral rites and bow to their deceased ancestors. After the ancestral rites, people visit ancestor's graves or talk while eating food.
g_text_translate.it:
Il 15° giorno dell'8° mese lunare è Chuseok. Quest'anno, Chuseok cade il 6 ottobre del calendario gregoriano. In questo giorno, tutti i membri della famiglia che vivono lontano si riuniscono. Il songpyeon viene prodotto con il nuovo riso dell'anno e con i cereali e la frutta raccolti quell'anno viene preparato cibo delizioso. La mattina di Chuseok, le persone preparano una tavola per i riti ancestrali e si inchinano ai loro antenati defunti. Dopo i riti ancestrali, le persone visitano le tombe degli antenati o parlano mentre mangiano.

#######

The 15th day of the 8th lunar month is Chuseok. This year, Chuseok falls on October 6 in the Gregorian calendar. On this day, all family members who live far away gather together. Songpyeon is made with the new rice of the year, and delicious food is prepared with the grains and fruits harvested that year. On the morning of Chuseok, people prepare a table for ancestral rites and bow to their deceased ancestors. After the ancestral rites, people visit ancestor's graves or talk while eating food.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le 15e jour du 8e mois lunaire est Chuseok. Cette année, Chuseok tombe le 6 octobre du calendrier grégorien. Ce jour-là, tous les membres de la famille qui vivent loin se rassemblent. Songpyeon est fait avec le nouveau riz de l'année, et de délicieux plats sont préparés avec les céréales et les fruits récoltés cette année-là. Le matin de Chuseok, les gens préparent une table pour les rites ancestraux et s'inclinent devant leurs ancêtres décédés. Après les rites ancestraux, les gens visitent les tombes des ancêtres ou parlent en mangeant.

Songpyeon se hace con el nuevo arroz del año y se prepara una deliciosa comida con los granos y frutos cosechados ese año. En la mañana de Chuseok, la gente prepara una mesa para los ritos ancestrales y se inclina ante sus antepasados ​​fallecidos. Después de los ritos ancestrales, la gente visita las tumbas de los antepasados ​​o habla mientras come.

g_text_translate.id:
Tanggal 15 bulan 8 lunar adalah Chuseok. Tahun ini, Chuseok jatuh pada 6 Oktober dalam kalender Gregorian. Pada hari ini, semua anggota keluarga yang tinggal jauh berkumpul bersama. Songpyeon dibuat dari beras baru tahun ini, dan makanan lezat disiapkan dari biji-bijian dan buah-buahan yang dipanen tahun itu. Pada pagi hari Chuseok, orang menyiapkan meja untuk upacara leluhur dan bersujud kepada leluhur mereka yang telah meninggal. Setelah upacara leluhur, orang mengunjungi makam leluhur atau berbicara sambil makan makanan.

g_text_translate.ja:
旧暦8月15日は秋夕です。今年の秋夕は、グレゴリオ暦で 10 月 6 日です。この日は、離れて暮らす家族が一堂に会します。ソンピョンはその年の新米で作られ、その年に収穫された穀物や果物でおいしい料理が作られます。秋夕の朝、人々は先祖代々の儀式のためにテーブルを用意し、亡くなった先祖に頭を下げます。先祖代々の儀式の後、人々は先祖の墓参りをしたり、食べ物を食べながら話をしたりします。

g_text_translate.de:
Der 15. Tag des 8. Mondmonats ist Chuseok. Dieses Jahr fällt Chuseok auf den 6. Oktober im gregorianischen Kalender. An diesem Tag versammeln sich alle Familienmitglieder, die weit entfernt wohnen. Songpyeon wird mit dem neuen Reis des Jahres zubereitet, und köstliche Speisen werden mit den in diesem Jahr geernteten Körnern und Früchten zubereitet. Am Morgen von Chuseok bereiten die Menschen einen Tisch für Ahnenriten vor und verneigen sich vor ihren verstorbenen Vorfahren. Nach den Riten der Vorfahren besuchen die Menschen die Gräber der Vorfahren oder unterhalten sich beim Essen.

g_text_translate.ru:
15-й день 8-го лунного месяца — Чусок. В этом году Чусок выпадает на 6 октября по григорианскому календарю. В этот день собираются вместе все члены семьи, живущие далеко. Сонгпён готовится из риса нового года, а вкусные блюда готовятся из зерен и фруктов, собранных в этом году. Утром Чусока люди готовят стол для родовых обрядов и кланяются своим умершим предкам. После родовых обрядов люди посещают могилы предков или разговаривают во время еды.

g_text_translate.hi:
8वें चंद्र माह का 15वां दिन चुसेओक है। इस वर्ष चुसेओक ग्रेगोरियन कैलेंडर के अनुसार 6 अक्टूबर को पड़ता है। इस दिन दूर-दराज रहने वाले परिवार के सभी सदस्य एक साथ इकट्ठा होते हैं। सोंगपयोन को साल के नए चावल से बनाया जाता है और उस साल काटे गए अनाज और फलों से स्वादिष्ट भोजन तैयार किया जाता है। चुसेओक की सुबह, लोग पैतृक संस्कारों के लिए एक मेज तैयार करते हैं और अपने मृत पूर्वजों को नमन करते हैं। पितृ संस्कार के बाद लोग पूर्वजों की कब्र पर जाते हैं या खाना खाते समय बातचीत करते हैं।

#######

The 15th day of the 8th lunar month is Chuseok. This year, Chuseok falls on October 6 in the Gregorian calendar. On this day, all family members who live far away gather together. Songpyeon is made with the new rice of the year, and delicious food is prepared with the grains and fruits harvested that year. On the morning of Chuseok, people prepare a table for ancestral rites and bow to their deceased ancestors. After the ancestral rites, people visit ancestor's graves or talk while eating food.
g_text_translate.tr:
8. kameri ayın 15. günü Chuseok'tur. Bu yıl Chuseok, Gregoryen takvimine göre 6 Ekim'e denk geliyor. Bu günde uzakta yaşayan tüm aile üyeleri bir araya geliyor. Songpyeon yılın yeni pirinciyle yapılır ve o yıl hasat edilen tahıllar ve meyvelerle lezzetli yemekler hazırlanır. Chuseok sabahı insanlar atalarının törenleri için bir masa hazırlar ve ölen atalarının önünde eğilirler. Ata ayinlerinin ardından insanlar atalarının mezarlarını ziyaret eder veya yemek yerken sohbet ederler.

#######

The 15th day of the 8th lunar month is Chuseok. This year, Chuseok falls on October 6 in the Gregorian calendar. On this day, all family members who live far away gather together. Songpyeon is made with the new rice of the year, and delicious food is prepared with the grains and fruits harvested that year. On the morning of Chuseok, people prepare a table for ancestral rites and bow to their deceased ancestors. After the ancestral rites, people visit ancestor's graves or talk while eating food.
g_text_translate.ne: 8 औं चन्द्र महिनाको 15 औं दिन चुसेओक हो। यस वर्ष, चुसेओक ग्रेगोरियन क्यालेन्डरमा अक्टोबर 6 मा पर्छ। यस दिन टाढा बस्ने परिवारका सबै सदस्यहरू भेला हुन्छन्। सोङपियोन वर्षको नयाँ धानसँग बनाइन्छ, र त्यस वर्षको अन्न र फलफूलबाट स्वादिष्ट खाना तयार गरिन्छ। चुसेओकको बिहान, मानिसहरूले पुर्खाहरूको संस्कारको लागि टेबल तयार पार्छन् र आफ्ना मृतक पुर्खाहरूलाई नमन गर्छन्। पितृ संस्कार पछि, मानिसहरू पितृको चिहानमा जान्छन् वा खाना खाँदा कुरा गर्छन्।
g_text_translate.km: ថ្ងៃទី 15 នៃខែទី 8 តាមច័ន្ទគតិគឺ Chuseok ។ ឆ្នាំនេះ Chuseok ធ្លាក់នៅថ្ងៃទី 6 ខែតុលាក្នុងប្រតិទិនហ្គ្រេហ្គោរៀន។ ក្នុងថ្ងៃនេះ សមាជិកគ្រួសារទាំងអស់ដែលរស់នៅឆ្ងាយជួបជុំគ្នា Songpyeon ធ្វើ​ដោយ​អង្ករ​ថ្មី​ប្រចាំ​ឆ្នាំ ហើយ​ម្ហូប​ឆ្ងាញ់​ត្រូវ​បាន​រៀបចំ​ជាមួយ​នឹង​គ្រាប់​ធញ្ញជាតិ និង​ផ្លែឈើ​ដែល​ប្រមូល​ផល​នៅ​ឆ្នាំ​នោះ។ នៅ​ព្រឹក​ថ្ងៃ​ចោម​ចៅ មនុស្ស​រៀបចំ​តុ​សម្រាប់​ធ្វើ​ពិធី​គោរព​វិញ្ញាណក្ខន្ធ​បុព្វការី​ជន​។ បន្ទាប់​ពី​ធ្វើ​ពិធី​ដូនតា​រួច មនុស្ស​ម្នា​ទៅ​លេង​ផ្នូរ​ដូនតា ឬ​និយាយ​គ្នា​ពេល​ហូប​អាហារ។
g_text_translate.si: 8 වන චන්ද්‍ර මාසයේ 15 වන දිනය චුසොක් වේ. මෙම වසරේ, චුසොක් ග්‍රෙගෝරියානු දින දර්ශනයේ ඔක්තෝබර් 6 වන දිනට වැටේ. මෙම දිනයේ දුර බැහැර ජීවත් වන සියලුම පවුලේ සාමාජිකයන් එකට එකතු වේ. වසරේ අලුත් සහල්වලින් Songpyeon සාදන අතර, එම වසරේ අස්වැන්න නෙළන ලද ධාන්‍ය සහ පලතුරු සමඟ රසවත් ආහාර පිළියෙළ කරනු ලැබේ. චුසොක් උදේ, මිනිසුන් මුතුන් මිත්තන්ගේ චාරිත්‍ර සඳහා මේසයක් පිළියෙළ කර ඔවුන්ගේ මියගිය මුතුන් මිත්තන්ට හිස නමා ආචාර කරති. මුතුන් මිත්තන්ගේ චාරිත්‍රවලින් පසු, මිනිසුන් මුතුන් මිත්තන්ගේ සොහොන්වලට පැමිණ හෝ ආහාර අනුභව කරන අතරතුර කතා කරති.
g_text_translate.bn: 8ম চান্দ্র মাসের 15 তম দিন হল চুসেওক। এই বছর, চুসেওক গ্রেগরিয়ান ক্যালেন্ডারে 6 অক্টোবর পড়ে। এই দিনে দূরে বসবাসকারী পরিবারের সকল সদস্য একত্রিত হয়। সংপিয়ন বছরের নতুন ধান দিয়ে তৈরি করা হয় এবং সেই বছর কাটা শস্য ও ফল দিয়ে সুস্বাদু খাবার তৈরি করা হয়। চুসেওকের সকালে, লোকেরা পূর্বপুরুষের আচারের জন্য একটি টেবিল প্রস্তুত করে এবং তাদের মৃত পূর্বপুরুষদের কাছে প্রণাম করে। পৈতৃক আচারের পরে, লোকেরা পূর্বপুরুষের কবর পরিদর্শন করে বা খাবার খাওয়ার সময় কথা বলে।
g_text_translate.my: ၈လပိုင်း ၁၅ရက်နေ့သည် Chuseok ဖြစ်သည်။ ယခုနှစ်တွင် Chuseok သည် Gregorian ပြက္ခဒိန်တွင် အောက်တိုဘာလ 6 ရက်နေ့တွင်ကျရောက်သည်။ ဤနေ့တွင် ဝေးကွာနေသော မိသားစုဝင်များအားလုံး စုဝေးကြသည်။ Songpyeon သည် တစ်နှစ်တာ၏ ဆန်အသစ်ဖြင့် ပြုလုပ်ထားပြီး အရသာရှိသော အစားအစာများကို ထိုနှစ်တွင် ရိတ်သိမ်းထားသော အစေ့အဆန်များနှင့် သစ်သီးများဖြင့် ပြင်ဆင်ထားသည်။ Chuseok ၏ နံနက်ခင်းတွင် လူများသည် ဘိုးဘွားစဉ်ဆက် စားပွဲကို ပြင်ဆင်ကြပြီး ကွယ်လွန်သွားသော ဘိုးဘေးများကို ဦးညွှတ်ကြသည်။ ဘိုးဘွားစဉ်ဆက် ထုံးတမ်းစဉ်လာများ အပြီးတွင် လူများသည် ဘိုးဘွားများ၏ သင်္ချိုင်းများသို့ သွားရောက် လည်ပတ်ကြပြီး အစားအသောက် စားသောက်ရင်း စကားပြောကြသည်။

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án giải thích không đúng về tết Trung thu.

3. Cúi lạy bố mẹ.
4. Làm bánh Songpyeon từ ngũ cốc và lương thực mới thu hoạch.
-------------------- 
햇곡식: Ngũ cốc và lương thực mới thu hoạch
조상: Tổ tiên
절을 하다: Bái lạy, cúi 
차례를 지내다: Làm lễ 
성묘를 가다: Đi tảo mộ

V + (으)ㄴ 후에: Sau khi.
N + (으)로: Bằng (phương tiện, cách thức, nguyên liệu gì).
V + 아/어서: Làm việc này rồi sau đó làm việc kia (Lưu ý: 하여 là cách viết khác của 해서).

Vào dịp tết Trung thu, người Hàn Quốc cúi lạy tổ tiên đã qua đời, không cúi lạy bố mẹ nên đáp án đúng là 3.
explain.en:
Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.
3. People bow down to their parents.
4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.

<g>조상:</g> Ancestor
<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> To have a memorial service for ancestors
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> To visit ancestor's graves

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> After.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

4. Сонгпён готовят из новых зерен.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g>Новый урожай зерна
<g>조상:</g>Предок
<g>절을 하다:</g>Кланяться
<g>차례를 지내다:</g>Устроить поминальную службу по предкам
<g>성묘를 가다:</g>Посетить могилы предков

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>После.
<g>N + (으)로:</g>По (средствам, методам, материалам).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>Используется для обозначения выполнения одного действия, а затем второго действия (Примечание:<g>하여 = 해서</g>).

На Чусок корейцы кланяются своим умершим предкам, а не родителям, поэтому правильный ответ — 3.

#######

Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.
3. People bow down to their parents.
4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> New crop of grain
<g>조상:</g> Ancestor
<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> To have a memorial service for ancestors
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> To visit ancestor's graves

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> After.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

On Chuseok, Koreans bow to their deceased ancestors, not to their parents, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.th:
เลือกอันที่ไม่ตรงกับคำอธิบายของเทศกาลชูซ็อก

1.ประชาชนมีพิธีไว้อาลัยในตอนเช้า
2. ผู้คนทำและกินซองพยอน
3. ผู้คนกราบไหว้พ่อแม่
4. ผู้คนทำซงพยอนด้วยธัญพืชใหม่ๆ
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g>เมล็ดพืชชนิดใหม่
<g>조상:</g>บรรพบุรุษ
<g>절을 하다:</g>ที่จะโค้งคำนับ
<g>차례를 지내다:</g>เพื่อจัดให้มีพิธีรำลึกถึงบรรพบุรุษ
<g>성묘를 가다:</g>เพื่อเยี่ยมชมหลุมศพของบรรพบุรุษ

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>หลังจาก.
<g>N + (으)로:</g>โดย (วิธีการ วิธีการ วัสดุ)
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>ใช้เพื่อแสดงการกระทำหนึ่งแล้วการกระทำที่สอง (หมายเหตุ:<g>하여 = 해서</g>).

ในเทศกาลชูซ็อก ชาวเกาหลีจะคำนับบรรพบุรุษที่เสียชีวิต ไม่ใช่พ่อแม่ ดังนั้นคำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ 3

#######

Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.
3. People bow down to their parents.
4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> New crop of grain
<g>조상:</g> Ancestor
<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> To have a memorial service for ancestors
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> To visit ancestor's graves

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> After.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

On Chuseok, Koreans bow to their deceased ancestors, not to their parents, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.pt:
Escolha aquele que não se enquadra na descrição do Chuseok.

1. As pessoas fazem um serviço memorial pela manhã.
2. As pessoas fazem e comem Songpyeon.
3. As pessoas se curvam diante dos pais.
4. As pessoas fazem Songpyeon com grãos novos.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g>Nova safra de grãos
<g>조상:</g>Antepassado
<g>절을 하다:</g>Curvar-se
<g>차례를 지내다:</g>Para ter um serviço memorial para os antepassados
<g>성묘를 가다:</g>Para visitar os túmulos dos ancestrais

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>Depois.
<g>N + (으)로:</g>Por (meios, métodos, materiais).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>Usado para expressar a realização de uma ação e depois uma segunda ação (Nota:<g>하여 = 해서</g>).

Em Chuseok, os coreanos se curvam aos seus ancestrais falecidos, não aos seus pais, então a resposta correta é 3.

#######

Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.

4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.
--------------------

<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow

<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

On Chuseok, Koreans bow to their deceased ancestors, not to their parents, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो चुसेओक के विवरण में फिट नहीं बैठता।

1. सुबह के समय लोगों की स्मृति सभा होती है।
2. लोग सोंगपियोन बनाते और खाते हैं.
3. लोग अपने माता-पिता को प्रणाम करते हैं।
4. लोग नए अनाज से सोंगपयोन बनाते हैं.
------------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g>अनाज की नई फसल
<g>조상:</g>पूर्वज
<g>절을 하다:</g>नमन के लिए
<g>차례를 지내다:</g>पूर्वजों के लिए स्मारक सेवा करना
<g>성묘를 가다:</g>पूर्वजों की कब्रों पर जाना

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>बाद में।
<g>N + (으)로:</g>द्वारा (साधन, विधियाँ, सामग्री)।
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>एक क्रिया फिर दूसरी क्रिया करने को व्यक्त करने के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है (नोट:<g>하여 = 해서</g>).

चुसेओक पर, कोरियाई लोग अपने माता-पिता को नहीं, बल्कि अपने मृत पूर्वजों को नमन करते हैं, इसलिए सही उत्तर 3 है।

#######

Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.
3. People bow down to their parents.
4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> New crop of grain
<g>조상:</g> Ancestor
<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> To have a memorial service for ancestors
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> To visit ancestor's graves

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> After.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

On Chuseok, Koreans bow to their deceased ancestors, not to their parents, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.tr:
Chuseok'un tanımına uymayan olanı seçin.

1. İnsanların sabah anma töreni vardır.
2. İnsanlar Songpyeon'u yapıp yiyor.
3. İnsanlar anne ve babalarının önünde eğilirler.
4. İnsanlar Songpyeon'u yeni tahıllarla yapıyorlar.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g>Yeni tahıl mahsulü
<g>조상:</g>Ata
<g>절을 하다:</g>Boyun eğmek
<g>차례를 지내다:</g>Atalar için anma töreni düzenlemek
<g>성묘를 가다:</g>Atalarının mezarlarını ziyaret etmek

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g>Sonrasında.
<g>N + (으)로:</g>Tarafından (araçlar, yöntemler, materyaller).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>Bir eylemin ardından ikinci bir eylemin yapılmasını ifade etmek için kullanılır (Not:<g>하여 = 해서</g>).

Chuseok'ta Koreliler ebeveynlerinin değil ölen atalarının önünde eğilir, dolayısıyla doğru cevap 3'tür.

#######

Choose the one that does not fit the description of Chuseok.

1. People have a memorial service in the morning.
2. People make and eat Songpyeon.
3. People bow down to their parents.
4. People make Songpyeon with new grains.
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> New crop of grain
<g>조상:</g> Ancestor
<g>절을 하다:</g> To bow
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> To have a memorial service for ancestors
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> To visit ancestor's graves

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> After.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action (Note: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

On Chuseok, Koreans bow to their deceased ancestors, not to their parents, so the correct answer is 3.
explain.ne:
चुसेकको विवरणमा नमिल्ने एउटा छान्नुहोस्।

1. मानिसहरु बिहान एक स्मारक सेवा छ।
2. मानिसहरूले Songpyeon बनाउँछन् र खान्छन्।
3. मानिसहरू आफ्ना आमाबाबुलाई झुकाउँछन्।
4. मानिसहरू नयाँ अनाज संग Songpyeon बनाउन।
----------------------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> अन्नको नयाँ बाली
<g>조상:</g> पुर्खा
<g>절을 하다:</g> झुक्नु
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> पुर्खाहरूको लागि स्मारक सेवा गर्न
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> पुर्खाको चिहानको भ्रमण गर्न

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> पछि।
<g>N + (으)로:</g> (माध्यम, विधि, सामग्री) द्वारा।
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> एउटा कार्य गरेर दोस्रो कार्यलाई व्यक्त गर्न प्रयोग गरिन्छ (नोट: <g>하여 = 해서</g>)।

चुसेओकमा, कोरियालीहरूले आफ्ना मृतक पुर्खाहरूलाई नमन गर्छन्, आफ्ना आमाबाबुलाई होइन, त्यसैले सही जवाफ 3 हो।
explain.km:
ជ្រើសរើសមួយដែលមិនសមនឹងការពិពណ៌នារបស់ Chuseok ។

1. ប្រជាជនមានពិធីគោរពវិញ្ញាណក្ខន្ធនៅពេលព្រឹក។
2. មនុស្សបង្កើត និងបរិភោគ Songpyeon ។
៣.មនុស្ស​ក្រាប​បង្គំ​ឪពុក​ម្ដាយ។
4. មនុស្សបង្កើត Songpyeon ជាមួយនឹងគ្រាប់ធញ្ញជាតិថ្មី។
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> ដំណាំគ្រាប់ធញ្ញជាតិថ្មី។
<g>조상:</g> បុព្វបុរស
<g>절을하다:</g> ក្រាប
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> ដើម្បីមានពិធីបុណ្យរំលឹកដល់ដូនតា
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> ដើម្បីទៅលេងផ្នូរដូនតា

<g>V + (으)ㄴ후에:</g> បន្ទាប់ពី។
<g>N + (으)로:</g> ដោយ (មធ្យោបាយ វិធីសាស្រ្ត សម្ភារៈ)។
<g>V + 아/어서៖</g> ប្រើ​ដើម្បី​បង្ហាញ​ពី​ការ​ធ្វើ​សកម្មភាព​មួយ បន្ទាប់​មក​សកម្មភាព​ទីពីរ (ចំណាំ៖ <g>하여 = 해서</g>)។

នៅថ្ងៃ Chuseok ជនជាតិកូរ៉េក្រាបថ្វាយបង្គំបុព្វការីជនរបស់ពួកគេ មិនមែនចំពោះឪពុកម្តាយរបស់ពួកគេទេ ដូច្នេះចម្លើយត្រឹមត្រូវគឺ 3 ។
explain.si:
Chuseok හි විස්තරයට නොගැලපෙන එකක් තෝරන්න.

1. මිනිසුන්ට උදෑසන අනුස්මරණ සේවයක් ඇත.
2. මිනිස්සු Songpyeon හදලා කනවා.
3. මිනිසුන් තම දෙමාපියන්ට වැඳ වැටේ.
4. මිනිස්සු අලුත් ධාන්‍ය වලින් Songpyeon හදනවා.
----------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> නව ධාන්‍ය අස්වැන්න
<g>조상:</g> මුතුන් මිත්තන්
<g>절을 하다:</g> නැමීමට
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> මුතුන් මිත්තන් සඳහා අනුස්මරණ සේවාවක් පැවැත්වීමට
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> මුතුන් මිත්තන්ගේ සොහොන් නැරඹීමට

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> පසු.
<g>N + (으)로:</g> (මාර්ග, ක්‍රම, ද්‍රව්‍ය).
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> එක් ක්‍රියාවක් කිරීමෙන් පසුව දෙවන ක්‍රියාවක් කිරීම ප්‍රකාශ කිරීමට භාවිතා කරයි (සටහන: <g>하여 = 해서</g>).

චුසොක්හි කොරියානුවන් හිස නමන්නේ ඔවුන්ගේ මියගිය මුතුන් මිත්තන්ට මිස ඔවුන්ගේ දෙමාපියන්ට නොවේ, එබැවින් නිවැරදි පිළිතුර 3 වේ.
explain.bn:
চুসেওকের বর্ণনার সাথে খাপ খায় না এমন একটি বেছে নিন।

1. সকালে মানুষ একটি স্মারক সেবা আছে.
2. মানুষ Songpyeon তৈরি করে খায়।
3. মানুষ তাদের পিতামাতার কাছে মাথা নত করে।
4. মানুষ নতুন শস্য দিয়ে Songpyeon তৈরি করে।
------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> শস্যের নতুন ফসল
<g>조상:</g> পূর্বপুরুষ
<g>절을 하다:</g> নত করা
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> পূর্বপুরুষদের জন্য একটি স্মারক সেবা করা
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> পূর্বপুরুষের কবর পরিদর্শন করতে

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> পরে।
<g>N + (으)로:</g> দ্বারা (অর্থ, পদ্ধতি, উপকরণ)।
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> একটি ক্রিয়া করার পরে দ্বিতীয় ক্রিয়াটি প্রকাশ করতে ব্যবহৃত হয় (দ্রষ্টব্য: <g>하여 = 해서</g>)।

চুসেওকে, কোরিয়ানরা তাদের মৃত পূর্বপুরুষদের কাছে প্রণাম করে, তাদের পিতামাতার কাছে নয়, তাই সঠিক উত্তর হল 3।
explain.my:
Chuseok ၏ဖော်ပြချက်နှင့်မကိုက်ညီသောတစ်ခုကိုရွေးချယ်ပါ။

1. နံနက်ပိုင်းတွင် လူတို့သည် အောက်မေ့ဖွယ် အခမ်းအနား ပြုလုပ်ကြသည်။
2. လူတွေက Songpyeon လုပ်စားကြတယ်။
၃။ လူတို့သည် မိဘကို ဦးညွှတ်ကြကုန်၏။
4. လူတွေက Songpyeon ကို အစေ့အဆန်အသစ်တွေနဲ့ ပြုလုပ်ကြပါတယ်။
--------------------
<g>햇곡식:</g> စပါးသီးနှံသစ်
<g>조상:</g> ဘိုးဘေး
<g>절을하다:</g> ဦးညွှတ်ရန်
<g>차례를 지내다:</g> ဘိုးဘေးများအတွက် အောက်မေ့ဖွယ်အခမ်းအနားကျင်းပရန်
<g>성묘를 가다:</g> ဘိုးဘွားများ၏ သင်္ချိုင်းသို့ သွားရောက်လည်ပတ်ရန်

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 후에:</g> နောက်။
<g>N + (으)로:</g> (နည်းလမ်းများ၊ နည်းလမ်းများ၊ ပစ္စည်း)။
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> လုပ်ဆောင်ချက်တစ်ခုကို လုပ်ဆောင်ပြီးနောက် ဒုတိယလုပ်ဆောင်ချက်ကို ဖော်ပြရန်အသုံးပြုသည် (မှတ်ချက်- <g>하여 = 해서</g>)။

Chuseok တွင် ကိုရီးယားလူမျိုးများသည် ၎င်းတို့၏မိဘများကိုမဟုတ်ဘဲ ကွယ်လွန်သွားသောဘိုးဘေးများအား ဦးညွှတ်ဦးညွှတ်ကြသောကြောင့် အဖြေမှန်မှာ 3 ဖြစ်သည်။

general.g_text: 한국 음식 중에서 김치가 아주 유명합니다. 김치는 여러 종류가 있는데, 한국 사람들이 가장 많이 먹는 김치는 배추로 만든 '배추김치'입니다. 그 외에 무로 만든 '깍두기', 오이로 만든 ‘오이김치’, 총각무로 만든 ‘총각김치’도 한국 사람들이 자주 먹는 김치입니다. 김치는 이처럼 배추나 무, 오이 등에 소금, 고춧가루, 마늘, 파 등을 넣어서 만드는데, 고춧가루를 많이 넣으면 김치가 맵게 됩니다. 나는 김치를 좋아하지만 매워서 많이 먹지는 못합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Kimchi rất nổi tiếng trong các món ăn của Hàn Quốc. Có nhiều loại kimchi nhưng kimchi mà người Hàn Quốc ăn nhiều nhất là 'kimchi cải thảo' được làm từ cải thảo. Ngoài ra, 'kimchi củ cải thái hình vuông' làm bằng củ cải, 'kimchi dưa chuột' làm bằng dưa chuột và 'kimchi củ cải non' làm bằng củ cải non cũng là những món kimchi mà người Hàn Quốc hay ăn. Kimchi được làm bằng cách cho muối, bột ớt, tỏi, hành lá,... vào cải thảo, củ cải hay dưa leo, nhưng nếu cho nhiều bột ớt kimchi sẽ bị cay. Tôi thích kimchi nhưng vì cay quá nên tôi không ăn nhiều được.
g_text_translate.en: Among Korean foods, kimchi is very famous. There are many types of kimchi, but the kimchi that Koreans eat the most is 'Baechu Kimchi' made from cabbage. In addition, 'Sliced radish kimchi' made with radish, 'Cucumber Kimchi' made with cucumber, and 'Bachelor Kimchi' made with young radish are also kimchi that Koreans often eat. Kimchi is made by adding salt, red pepper powder, garlic, green onions, etc. to cabbage, radish, or cucumber. Adding a lot of red pepper powder makes kimchi spicy. I like kimchi, but I can't eat it much because it's spicy.
g_text_translate.it:
Tra i cibi coreani, il kimchi è molto famoso. Esistono molti tipi di kimchi, ma il kimchi che i coreani mangiano di più è il "Baechu Kimchi" a base di cavolo. Inoltre, anche il "Kimchi di ravanello a fette" fatto con ravanello, il "Kimchi al cetriolo" fatto con cetriolo e il "Bachelor Kimchi" fatto con ravanello giovane sono anch'essi kimchi che i coreani mangiano spesso. Il kimchi viene prodotto aggiungendo sale, peperoncino in polvere, aglio, cipolle verdi, ecc. a cavoli, ravanelli o cetrioli. L'aggiunta di molta polvere di peperoncino rende il kimchi piccante. Mi piace il kimchi, ma non posso mangiarlo molto perché è piccante.

#######

Among Korean foods, kimchi is very famous. There are many types of kimchi, but the kimchi that Koreans eat the most is 'Baechu Kimchi' made from cabbage. In addition, 'Sliced radish kimchi' made with radish, 'Cucumber Kimchi' made with cucumber, and 'Bachelor Kimchi' made with young radish are also kimchi that Koreans often eat. Kimchi is made by adding salt, red pepper powder, garlic, green onions, etc. to cabbage, radish, or cucumber. Adding a lot of red pepper powder makes kimchi spicy. I like kimchi, but I can't eat it much because it's spicy.
g_text_translate.fr:
Parmi les aliments coréens, le kimchi est très célèbre. Il existe de nombreux types de kimchi, mais le kimchi que les Coréens mangent le plus est le « Baechu Kimchi » à base de chou. De plus, le «kimchi de radis en tranches» à base de radis, le «kimchi au concombre» à base de concombre et le «kimchi Bachelor» à base de jeune radis sont également des kimchi que les Coréens mangent souvent. Le kimchi est préparé en ajoutant du sel, de la poudre de piment rouge, de l'ail, des oignons verts, etc. au chou, au radis ou au concombre. Ajouter beaucoup de poudre de piment rouge rend le kimchi épicé. J'aime le kimchi, mais je ne peux pas en manger beaucoup car c'est épicé.

#######

Kimchi is made by adding salt, red pepper powder, garlic, green onions, etc. to cabbage, radish, or cucumber. Adding a lot of red pepper powder makes kimchi spicy. I like kimchi, but I can't eat it much because it's spicy.
g_text_translate.es:
Entre los alimentos coreanos, el kimchi es muy famoso. Hay muchos tipos de kimchi, pero el kimchi que más comen los coreanos es el 'Baechu Kimchi' hecho de col. Además, el 'kimchi de rábano en rodajas' hecho con rábano, el 'kimchi de pepino' hecho con pepino y el 'kimchi soltero' hecho con rábano tierno también son kimchi que los coreanos suelen comer. El kimchi se prepara agregando sal, pimiento rojo en polvo, ajo, cebollas verdes, etc. al repollo, el rábano o el pepino. Agregar mucho polvo de pimiento rojo hace que el kimchi sea picante. Me gusta el kimchi, pero no puedo comerlo mucho porque es picante.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Di antara makanan Korea, kimchi sangat terkenal. Ada banyak jenis kimchi, namun kimchi yang paling banyak dimakan orang Korea adalah 'Baechu Kimchi' yang terbuat dari kubis. Selain itu, 'Irisan lobak kimchi' yang dibuat dengan lobak, 'Kimchi Mentimun' yang dibuat dengan mentimun, dan 'Kimchi Sarjana' yang dibuat dengan lobak muda juga merupakan kimchi yang sering dimakan orang Korea. Kimchi dibuat dengan menambahkan garam, bubuk cabai merah, bawang putih, daun bawang, dll. ke kubis, lobak, atau mentimun. Menambahkan banyak bubuk cabai merah membuat kimchi terasa pedas. Saya suka kimchi, tapi saya tidak bisa makan banyak karena pedas.

韓国料理の中でもキムチはとても有名です。キムチにはたくさんの種類がありますが、韓国人が最も多く食べるキムチは白菜キムチです。また、大根で作った「千切り大根キムチ」、きゅうりで作った「きゅうりキムチ」、若い大根で作った「バチェラーキムチ」も韓国人がよく食べるキムチです。キムチは、キャ​​ベツ、大根、きゅうりなどに塩、唐辛子粉、にんにく、ねぎなどを加えて作ります。唐辛子粉をたっぷり入れるとキムチがピリ辛になります。キムチは好きだけど辛いからあまり食べられない。

Unter den koreanischen Speisen ist Kimchi sehr berühmt. Es gibt viele Arten von Kimchi, aber das Kimchi, das die Koreaner am meisten essen, ist „Baechu Kimchi“, das aus Kohl hergestellt wird. Darüber hinaus sind Kimchi aus Rettich mit Rettich in Scheiben, Kimchi mit Gurke und Gurke sowie Kimchi mit jungem Rettich, das von Koreanern oft gegessen wird. Kimchi wird durch Zugabe von Salz, rotem Paprikapulver, Knoblauch, Frühlingszwiebeln usw. zu Kohl, Rettich oder Gurke hergestellt. Die Zugabe von viel rotem Paprikapulver macht Kimchi scharf. Ich mag Kimchi, aber ich kann es nicht oft essen, weil es scharf ist.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在韩国食品中，泡菜是非常有名的。泡菜有很多种，但韩国人吃得最多的泡菜是用卷心菜做的“白菜泡菜”。此外，用萝卜做的“萝卜片泡菜”、用黄瓜做的“黄瓜泡菜”、用嫩萝卜做的“学士泡菜”也是韩国人常吃的泡菜。泡菜是在卷心菜、萝卜或黄瓜中加入盐、红辣椒粉、大蒜、葱等制成的。加入大量红辣椒粉使泡菜变得辛辣。我喜欢泡菜，但我不能吃太多，因为它很辣。

#######

g_text_translate.ru:
Среди корейских блюд очень известно кимчи. Существует много видов кимчи, но больше всего корейцы едят кимчи «Бэчу Кимчи», приготовленное из капусты. Кроме того, корейцы часто едят «Кимчи из нарезанного редиса», приготовленное из редиса, «Кимчи из огурца» из огурца и «Кимчи холостяка», приготовленное из молодого редиса. Кимчи готовят путем добавления соли, красного перца, чеснока, зеленого лука и т. д. к капусте, редису или огурцу. Добавление большого количества красного перца делает кимчи острым. Я люблю кимчи, но не могу есть его много, потому что оно острое.

ในบรรดาอาหารเกาหลี กิมจิมีชื่อเสียงมาก กิมจิมีหลายประเภท แต่กิมจิที่คนเกาหลีกินมากที่สุดคือ 'แบชูกิมจิ' ที่ทำจากกะหล่ำปลี นอกจากนี้ 'กิมจิหัวไชเท้าหั่น' ที่ทำจากหัวไชเท้า 'กิมจิแตงกวา' ที่ทำจากแตงกวา และ 'กิมจิตรี' ที่ทำจากหัวไชเท้าอ่อน ก็เป็นกิมจิที่คนเกาหลีมักรับประทานกันเช่นกัน กิมจิทำโดยการเติมเกลือ ผงพริกแดง กระเทียม ต้นหอม ฯลฯ ลงในกะหล่ำปลี หัวไชเท้า หรือแตงกวา การใส่ผงพริกแดงจำนวนมากจะทำให้กิมจิมีรสเผ็ด ฉันชอบกิมจิ แต่ฉันกินไม่มากเพราะมันเผ็ด

g_text_translate.pt:
Entre as comidas coreanas, o kimchi é muito famoso. Existem muitos tipos de kimchi, mas o kimchi que os coreanos mais comem é o 'Baechu Kimchi' feito de repolho. Além disso, 'Kimchi de rabanete fatiado' feito com rabanete, 'Kimchi de pepino' feito com pepino e 'Kimchi de solteiro' feito com rabanete jovem também são kimchi que os coreanos costumam comer. Kimchi é feito adicionando sal, pimenta vermelha em pó, alho, cebolinha, etc. ao repolho, rabanete ou pepino. Adicionar muito pó de pimenta vermelha torna o kimchi picante. Gosto de kimchi, mas não posso comer muito porque é picante.

g_text_translate.hi:
कोरियाई खाद्य पदार्थों में किमची बहुत प्रसिद्ध है। किमची कई प्रकार की होती है, लेकिन कोरियाई लोग जिस किमची को सबसे ज्यादा खाते हैं, वह पत्तागोभी से बनी 'बेचू किमची' है। इसके अलावा, मूली से बनी 'कटा हुआ मूली किमची', खीरे से बनी 'ककड़ी किमची' और युवा मूली से बनी 'बैचलर किमची' भी किमची हैं जिन्हें कोरियाई लोग अक्सर खाते हैं। किम्ची पत्तागोभी, मूली या खीरे में नमक, लाल मिर्च पाउडर, लहसुन, हरा प्याज आदि मिलाकर बनाई जाती है। ढेर सारा लाल मिर्च पाउडर मिलाने से किमची तीखी हो जाती है। मुझे किमची पसंद है, लेकिन मसालेदार होने के कारण मैं इसे ज्यादा नहीं खा सकता।

#######

Among Korean foods, kimchi is very famous. There are many types of kimchi, but the kimchi that Koreans eat the most is 'Baechu Kimchi' made from cabbage. In addition, 'Sliced radish kimchi' made with radish, 'Cucumber Kimchi' made with cucumber, and 'Bachelor Kimchi' made with young radish are also kimchi that Koreans often eat. Kimchi is made by adding salt, red pepper powder, garlic, green onions, etc. to cabbage, radish, or cucumber. Adding a lot of red pepper powder makes kimchi spicy. I like kimchi, but I can't eat it much because it's spicy.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kore yemekleri arasında kimchi çok meşhurdur. Kimchi'nin pek çok çeşidi var ama Korelilerin en çok yediği kimchi lahanadan yapılan 'Baechu Kimchi'dir. Ayrıca turpla yapılan 'Dilimlenmiş turp kimchi', salatalıkla yapılan 'Salatalık Kimchi' ve taze turpla yapılan 'Bachelor Kimchi' de Korelilerin sıklıkla yediği kimchilerdir. Kimchi, lahana, turp veya salatalığa tuz, kırmızı biber tozu, sarımsak, yeşil soğan vb. eklenerek yapılır. Çok fazla kırmızı biber tozu eklemek kimchiyi baharatlı hale getirir. Kimçiyi severim ama baharatlı olduğu için fazla yiyemiyorum.

#######

Among Korean foods, kimchi is very famous. There are many types of kimchi, but the kimchi that Koreans eat the most is 'Baechu Kimchi' made from cabbage. In addition, 'Sliced radish kimchi' made with radish, 'Cucumber Kimchi' made with cucumber, and 'Bachelor Kimchi' made with young radish are also kimchi that Koreans often eat. Kimchi is made by adding salt, red pepper powder, garlic, green onions, etc. to cabbage, radish, or cucumber. Adding a lot of red pepper powder makes kimchi spicy. I like kimchi, but I can't eat it much because it's spicy.
g_text_translate.ne: कोरियाली खानाहरू मध्ये, किम्ची धेरै प्रसिद्ध छ। किम्ची धेरै प्रकारका हुन्छन् तर कोरियनहरूले सबैभन्दा बढी खाने किम्ची भनेको बन्दागोभीबाट बनेको ‘बेचु किम्ची’ हो। यसका साथै मूलाबाट बनेको ‘स्लाइस्ड रेडिस किम्ची’, काकडीबाट बनेको ‘ककम्बर किम्ची’ र जवान मूलीबाट बनेको ‘ब्याचलर किम्ची’ पनि कोरियालीहरूले खाने किम्ची हुन्। बन्दागोभी, मूली वा काकडीमा नुन, रातो खुर्सानीको धुलो, लसुन, हरियो प्याज आदि मिसाएर किम्ची बनाइन्छ। धेरै रातो मिर्च पाउडर थप्दा किम्ची मसालेदार बनाउँछ। मलाई किम्ची मन पर्छ, तर मसलादार भएकाले म यसलाई धेरै खान सक्दिन।
g_text_translate.km: ក្នុង​ចំណោម​អាហារ​កូរ៉េ គីមឈី​មាន​ភាព​ល្បីល្បាញ​ខ្លាំង​ណាស់។ គីមឈីមានច្រើនប្រភេទ ប៉ុន្តែគីមឈីដែលប្រជាជនកូរ៉េទទួលទានច្រើនជាងគេគឺ 'Baechu Kimchi' ធ្វើពីស្ពៃក្តោប។ បន្ថែមពីនេះ គីមឈីដែលធ្វើជាមួយ radish ត្រសក់គីមឈីធ្វើជាមួយត្រសក់ និង 'គីមឈីបរិញ្ញាបត្រ' ធ្វើជាមួយ radish វ័យក្មេងក៏ជាគីមឈីដែលប្រជាជនកូរ៉េតែងតែញ៉ាំផងដែរ។ គីមឈី​ត្រូវ​បាន​បង្កើត​ឡើង​ដោយ​បន្ថែម​អំបិល ម្សៅ​ម្រេច​ក្រហម ខ្ទឹមស ខ្ទឹមបារាំង​បៃតង ជាដើម​ទៅ​ស្ពៃក្តោប រ៉ាឌី ឬ​ត្រសក់។ ការបន្ថែមម្សៅម្រេចក្រហមច្រើនធ្វើឱ្យគីមឈីហឹរ។ ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តគីមឈី ប៉ុន្តែខ្ញុំមិនអាចញ៉ាំវាច្រើនបានទេព្រោះវាមានរសជាតិហឹរ។
g_text_translate.si: කොරියානු ආහාර අතර කිම්චි ඉතා ප්රසිද්ධය. කිම්චි වර්ග බොහොමයක් ඇතත් කොරියානුවන් වැඩිපුරම ආහාරයට ගන්නා කිම්චි වර්ගය වන්නේ ගෝවා වලින් සාදන ලද 'බේචු කිම්චි' ය. මීට අමතරව රාබුවලින් සාදන ලද 'ස්ලයිස්ඩ් රාබු කිම්චි', පිපිඤ්ඤාවලින් සාදන ලද 'පිපිඤ්ඤා කිම්චි', තරුණ රාබු යොදා සාදන 'බැචලර් කිම්චි' ද කොරියානුවන් නිතර ආහාරයට ගන්නා කිම්චි වේ. කිම්චි සෑදී ඇත්තේ ගෝවා, රාබු හෝ පිපිඤ්ඤා වලට ලුණු, රතු ගම්මිරිස් කුඩු, සුදුළූණු, කොළ ලූනු ආදිය එකතු කිරීමෙනි. රතු ගම්මිරිස් කුඩු ගොඩක් එකතු කිරීමෙන් කිම්චි සැරයි. මම කිම්චි වලට කැමතියි, නමුත් එය කුළුබඩු සහිත නිසා මට එය කන්න බැහැ.
g_text_translate.bn: কোরিয়ান খাবারের মধ্যে কিমচি খুবই বিখ্যাত। অনেক ধরনের কিমচি আছে, তবে কোরিয়ানরা যে কিমচি সবচেয়ে বেশি খায় তা হল বাঁধাকপি থেকে তৈরি 'বেচু কিমচি'। এছাড়াও মুলা দিয়ে তৈরি 'স্লাইসড মূলা কিমচি', শসা দিয়ে তৈরি 'শসা কিমচি' এবং কচি মুলা দিয়ে তৈরি 'ব্যাচেলর কিমচি'ও কোরিয়ানরা প্রায়শই খায়। বাঁধাকপি, মূলা বা শসাতে লবণ, লাল মরিচের গুঁড়া, রসুন, সবুজ পেঁয়াজ ইত্যাদি যোগ করে কিমচি তৈরি করা হয়। প্রচুর পরিমাণে লাল মরিচের গুঁড়া যোগ করলে কিমচি মশলাদার হয়। আমি কিমচি পছন্দ করি, তবে আমি এটি খুব বেশি খেতে পারি না কারণ এটি মশলাদার।
g_text_translate.my: ကိုရီးယားအစားအစာတွေထဲမှာ ကင်မ်ချီက အရမ်းနာမည်ကြီးပါတယ်။ ကင်မ်ချီအမျိုးအစားများစွာရှိသော်လည်း ကိုရီးယားလူမျိုးများ အများဆုံးစားသုံးသော ကင်မ်ချီမှာ ဂေါ်ဖီထုပ်မှပြုလုပ်ထားသည့် 'Baechu Kimchi' ဖြစ်သည်။ ထို့အပြင်၊ မုန်လာဥနှင့်ပြုလုပ်ထားသော 'မုန်လာဥကင်မ်ချီ'၊ သခွားသီးနှင့်ပြုလုပ်ထားသော 'သခွားသီးကင်ချီ' နှင့် မုန်လာဥငယ်ဖြင့်ပြုလုပ်ထားသည့် 'Bachelor Kimchi' တို့သည် ကိုရီးယားလူမျိုးများ စားသုံးလေ့ရှိသော ကင်မ်ချီလည်းဖြစ်သည်။ ကင်ချီကို ဆား၊ ငရုတ်ကောင်းမှုန့်၊ ကြက်သွန်ဖြူ၊ ကြက်သွန်နီ စတာတွေကို ဂေါ်ဖီထုပ်၊ မုန်လာဥနီ ဒါမှမဟုတ် သခွားသီးထဲကို ထည့်ခြင်းဖြင့် ပြုလုပ်ထားပါတယ်။ ငရုတ်ကောင်းမှုန့် အများအပြားထည့်ခြင်းက ကင်မ်ချီးအစပ်ကို ဖြစ်စေပါတယ်။ ကင်မ်ချီကို ကြိုက်ပေမယ့် စပ်လို့တော့ သိပ်မစားနိုင်ဘူး။

explain.vi:
Kimchi mà người Hàn Quốc ăn nhiều nhất là kimchi nào?

1. Kimchi củ cải thái vuông
2. Kimchi cải thảo
3. Kimchi dưa chuột
4. Kimchi củ cải non
-------------------- 
여러 종류: Nhiều loại

N + (으)로: Bằng (phương tiện, cách thức, nguyên liệu gì).
V + 는 + N: Định ngữ của động từ thì hiện tại.

What kimchi do Koreans eat the most?

1. Sliced radish kimchi
2. Cabbage kimchi
3. Cucumber kimchi
4. Bachelor kimchi
--------------------
<g>여러 종류:</g> Various types

<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, methods, materials).
<g>V + 는 + N:</g> Noun modifiers for verbs of present tenses.
